mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM appointment WHERE status IN ('APPROVED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT') AND start_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT u.real_name as hostName, u.dept_id as deptId, COUNT(a.id) as visitCount FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.visited_user_id = u.id WHERE a.status IN ('APPROVED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT') GROUP BY a.visited_user_id ORDER BY visitCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
